product_overview: CinePurr is a real-time watch-together platform with synchronized video playback, social features (friends, notifications), room discovery, and gamified engagement (daily quests, XP, leaderboards). The platform exposes REST APIs for room, quest, friends and notification management and Socket.IO events for real-time video sync and clock ping.
core_goals: Provide low-latency, authoritative video synchronization for multi-user watch rooms.
Offer robust room management and discovery (public/private, invite codes, recommendations).
Drive daily engagement through quests, XP, streaks and leaderboards.
Enable social interaction: friends management, real-time notifications and activity feed.
Secure endpoints with auth, protect real-time channels from spoofing, and provide clear error handling.

features.name: Room Management API
features.description: Create, update and discover watch rooms (public/private, max users, invite codes, recommendations).
user_flows: POST /api/rooms with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body {name, description, tags, isPrivate, maxUsers} -> Receive 200 with Room object (id, inviteCode, hostId, maxUsers)
POST /api/rooms with missing Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
PATCH /api/rooms/[id] with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body {maxUsers, description} -> Receive 200 with updated Room object
PATCH /api/rooms/[id] with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> for a non-host user -> Receive 403 Forbidden
GET /api/rooms/recommendations?limit=5 -> Receive 200 with array of recommended room summaries (trending, recent, category)
GET /api/rooms/recommendations?limit=not-a-number -> Receive 400 Bad Request

features.name: Video Sync WebSocket
features.description: Socket.IO real-time synchronization endpoints for authoritative player state and clock sync to keep all clients in sync.
user_flows: Connect to Socket.IO server with valid session cookie or Authorization token and roomId query param -> Receive 'connect' ack from server

Emit 'player:sync' with {roomId, position, playing, clientTimestamp} over Socket.IO after connection -> Server broadcasts 'player:update' to room members with authoritative position and serverTimestamp -> Client receives 'player:update' and adjusts playback
Connect to Socket.IO without authentication (no session or invalid token) -> Server emits 'error' with reason 'unauthorized' or disconnects the socket
Emit 'room:ping' with {clientTimestamp} over Socket.IO -> Receive 'room:pong' with {serverTimestamp} -> Client computes clock offset for smoother timestamp interpolation
Emit 'room:ping' with malformed payload over Socket.IO -> Receive 'error' event with 400 Bad Request

features.name: Quests and XP API
features.description: Submit progress for daily quests, query leaderboards and activity feed to reflect XP and rankings.
user_flows: POST /api/quests/daily with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body {progress: 1} -> Receive 200 with updated DailyQuest progress and XP awarded to user
POST /api/quests/daily with missing Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/quests/daily with body {progress: -5} -> Receive 400 Bad Request
GET /api/leaderboards -> Receive 200 with leaderboard categories (watchTime, totalXP, streak, messagesSent, roomsCreated) and top entries
GET /api/activity -> Receive 200 with recent activity feed entries (room_join, room_create, badge_earn, friend_add, message)

features.name: Friends API
features.description: Accept friend requests and update friendship state so social features (friends list, now-watching) update accordingly.
user_flows: POST /api/friends/accept with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body {requestId: "abc123"} -> Receive 200 with friendship object {friendId, status:'accepted'}
POST /api/friends/accept with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body {requestId: "invalid"} -> Receive 404 Not Found
POST /api/friends/accept with missing Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Notifications API
features.description: Create in-app notifications which are stored and optionally pushed in real-time to recipients.
user_flows: POST /api/notifications with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body {title: "Invite", message: "Join my room", targetUserId: "user123"} -> Receive 200 with Notification object (id, title, message, targetUserId, createdAt)
POST /api/notifications with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and body missing title or message -> Receive 400 Bad Request
POST /api/notifications with missing Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

POST /api/notifications with Authorization: Bearer <JWT> and valid body -> Receive 200 with Notification object -> Server emits a Socket.IO 'notification' event to targetUserId socket(s) with the Notification payload
